title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
